name: IP Geolocation
description: Look up the country, city, ISP, and coordinates for any IP address. Free for up to 45 requests/minute. No authentication required.

tools.name: lookup_ip
tools.description: Get country, city, region, ISP, latitude, and longitude for a specific IP address.

params.name: query
params.description: IP address (e.g. 8.8.8.8) or domain name (e.g. google.com)

params.name: lang
params.description: Language for country/city names: en, de, es, pt-BR, fr, ja, zh-CN, ru

tools.name: lookup_my_ip
tools.description: Get location information for the IP address making the request.

tools.name: batch_lookup
tools.description: Look up location data for up to 100 IP addresses in a single request.
